reviews.comment:
Es un lugar muy seguro pase la noche en el estacionamiento por no conseguir hospedaje y todo bien.

(Translated by Google)
It's a very safe place. I spent the night in the parking lot because I couldn't find accommodation and everything was fine.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención.  La última vez que pasé,  tuve que esperar como 1 hora, porque estaban reponiendo combustible.  Debieran tenerlo en cuenta.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The last time I was there, I had to wait about an hour because they were refueling. They should take that into account.

reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria. Pero no había agua en los baños. Incomprensible, con semejante río al lado.

(Translated by Google)
A must-see stop. But there was no water in the bathrooms. Unbelievable, with such a river right next to us.

reviews.comment:
Se consiguen combustibles líquidos. Tiene local de ypf full. Precios caros

(Translated by Google)
Liquid fuels are available. It has a full YPF station. Prices are high.

reviews.comment:
Siempre me han atendido muy bien allí. Tanto la gente que trabaja en la playa como los que están en el buffet son muy cordiales. Suele haber mucha gente cargando combustible
Es recomendable

(Translated by Google)
I've always received excellent service there. Both the staff on the beach and those at the buffet are very friendly. It's usually busy filling up with fuel. Highly recommended.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario. Esperamos su pronta visita
